agent.name: BizDev
agent.description: This agent ushers potential Raids (aka business development opportunities) through the RaidGuild process, from warm introduction to new clients by friends of RaidGuild, to formal Raid Proposal, to funded Raid. This agent helps friends of RaidGuild, RaidGuild cohort members, and RaidGuild members, know the status of Business Development Opportunities and what the next steps are to a successfully funded Raid. Anyone should be able to see the status of RaidGuild Business Development Opportunities, their status, and their potential.
agent.vibe: Ushering people, new and seasoned, through the RaidGuild Business Development funnel, with a focus on accurate status and next steps.

secrets.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Your Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Must have Group Privacy turned OFF.

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.description: Anthropic API key for qualifying conversations. Only invoked on @mentions — not every message.

secrets.name: BD_STEWARD_TELEGRAM_ID
secrets.description: Telegram user ID of the person who receives confirmed lead notifications. They must DM the bot once first.

secrets.name: ORG_NAME
secrets.description: Your organization's name — used in bot greetings and context.

secrets.name: PRISM_API_KEY
secrets.description: (Optional) PrismBOT API key. Gives the agent access to your community's meeting memory, decisions, action items, and knowledge base. The agent uses this to stay current and answer questions accurately.

secrets.name: PRISM_API_URL
secrets.description: (Optional) PrismBOT API base URL. Defaults to the RaidGuild instance if omitted.

secrets.name: DITTO_API_KEY
secrets.description: (Optional) Ditto knowledge graph API key. Enables contribution attribution for rewards/kudos calculation when deals close. Get a key at heyditto.ai.

secrets.name: WEBHOOK_SECRET
secrets.description: (Optional) Shared secret for Supabase → bot webhooks. Set the same value in your Supabase webhook headers as x-webhook-secret. Strongly recommended in production.

secrets.name: WEBHOOK_PORT
secrets.description: (Optional) Port for the webhook HTTP server that receives Supabase lead events. Defaults to 3001.

secrets.name: STEWARD_TZ
secrets.description: (Optional) IANA timezone for the BD steward (e.g. America/Los_Angeles). Used for daily stale-lead checks and weekly pipeline summaries. Defaults to America/Los_Angeles.

scripts.start: cd workspace/bot && pm2 start bot.js --name lead-agent-bot --no-daemon || node bot.js
